subject: Review code quality, maintainability, and security
description: Review the delivered implementation for code quality, maintainability, and security/performance risks across lib/tli, scripts/tli, and schema artifacts. Focus on fragile assumptions, confusing APIs, data integrity risks, and anything that would make this unsafe or expensive to operate in production. Report only concrete findings with file:line refs.
result:
Verdict: REQUEST CHANGES

Findings:
1. Rollback-drill contract cannot prove the required 2 successful drills before cutover. Ticket requires two successful drills (docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-tickets.md:150-152), but the persisted/schema contract only stores total drill count + last success (supabase/migrations/027_tcar002_phase0_bridge_schema.sql:201-203; lib/tli/types/bridge-schema.ts:107-112), and eligibility only checks count plus non-null last success (scripts/tli/forecast-control.ts:79-88). Current tests encode that weaker rule (scripts/tli/__tests__/forecast-control.test.ts:154-164,210-219).
2. Serving reader still opens with no rollback target. TCAR-018 requires fail-closed serving when rollback target is missing (docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-tickets.md:519-523), but readServingVersion() does not check rollbackTargetVersion at all (scripts/tli/forecast-serving.ts:44-57) even though isServingAllowed() does (scripts/tli/forecast-serving.ts:72-82). The focused Node repro returned {"version":"2.0","serving":true} with rollbackTargetVersion:null.
3. Serving path still fails open to env/latest instead of artifact-backed control. loadActiveControlRow() swallows control-plane read failures (app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.ts:145-158), fetchPublishedComparisonRowsV4() then resolves serving version through resolveComparisonV4ServingVersion() (app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.ts:291-295), and the resolver falls back to env/default latest when controlRow is null (scripts/tli/comparison-v4-control.ts:36-44). Tests explicitly preserve that fallback (app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.test.ts:33-36; scripts/tli/__tests__/comparison-v4-control.test.ts:23-25).
4. Forecast ship gate omits the required confidence-gating checks and is not wired into a production path. Ticket acceptance requires analog_support/Gini/top-1 weight checks in the ship artifact (docs/tli-theme-cycle-analog-retrieval-tickets.md:480-496), but ShipGateInput/evaluateShipGate contain no such fields (scripts/tli/forecast-ship-gate.ts:23-31,62-128) even though the thresholds exist elsewhere (lib/tli/forecast/types.ts:88-95). Caller search shows evaluateShipGate only in its helper/test files, and evaluate-predictions has no ship-gate integration (scripts/tli/evaluate-predictions.ts:1-172).

Residual risks:
- Phase-0 bridge certification is still not operationalized: the advertised runner is a pure stub with pending defaults (scripts/tli/run-phase0-bridge.ts:1-36), and repo search found no production writer for bridge_run_audits_v1.

Verification:
- PASS typecheck: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- PASS focused tests: `npx vitest run scripts/tli/__tests__/forecast-control.test.ts scripts/tli/__tests__/forecast-serving.test.ts scripts/tli/__tests__/forecast-ship-gate.test.ts scripts/tli/__tests__/comparison-v4-control.test.ts scripts/tli/__tests__/phase0-bridge-certification.test.ts 'app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.test.ts'` → 6 files / 107 tests passed.
- PASS lint: `npx eslint scripts/tli/forecast-control.ts scripts/tli/forecast-serving.ts scripts/tli/forecast-ship-gate.ts scripts/tli/comparison-v4-control.ts 'app/api/tli/themes/[id]/comparison-v4-reader.ts' lib/tli/forecast/types.ts lib/tli/types/bridge-schema.ts`
- FAIL end-to-end/control-plane wiring: `rg -n "readServingVersion|isServingAllowed|writeShipVerdictToControl|evaluateShipGate|bridge_run_audits_v1" app scripts lib` showed helper/test-only usage for serving helpers, ship gate, and bridge audit artifacts.
- FAIL dynamic fail-closed check: `node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e "..."` returned servingWithoutRollbackTarget.version='2.0'/serving=true and fallbackServingVersion='latest'.
